hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); case "$CMD" in *'git checkout -b '*|*'git switch -c '*|*'git switch --create '*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not create branches directly. Use a worktree instead (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; *'git push --force'*|*'git push -f'*) echo 'BLOCK: Force push is too dangerous and is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; case "$BRANCH" in main) case "$CMD" in *'git push'*) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot git push directly from main branch. Use a worktree instead (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; *'git reset --hard'*) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot git reset --hard on main branch. Use a worktree instead (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; *'git merge '*) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot git merge on main branch. Use a worktree instead (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); case "$BRANCH" in main) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit files on main branch. Use a worktree first (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; esac

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); case "$BRANCH" in main) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit files on main branch. Use a worktree first (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; esac
